name: ASUS PRIME Z790-A WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - USB4 Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME Z790-A WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX Z790 PRIME motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 socket with DDR5 and comprehensive connectivity.
